en: In some places, public media is the only source of local news.
ko: 7월에 의회가 CPB 예산 전면 삭감 계획을 승인했어.

en: According to one analysis, in nine counties, a public broadcasting station is the sole source
ko: 7월에 의회가 CPB 예산 전면 삭감 계획을 승인했어.

en: of local news coverage. And in 47 others, it's one of only two,
ko: 이 행정부가 저지른 수많은 터무니없는 일 중 하나야. 올해 구글 1위 검색어는 아마

en: with the other typically being a weekly newspaper.
And local public media scored some amazing scoops to rattle off just a few.
In West Virginia, these outlets uncovered the fact that Bob Murray, friend of the pod,
ko: 12억 달러. 이 모든 것이 당연히 많은 사람들을 화나게 했어. 심지어 공영 미디어 팬이 아닐 거라고 생각한 사람들까지.

en: fought back... fought against black lung regulations and then filed for black lung benefits for himself,
which is exactly the kind of behavior that might lead someone to tell you to go eat shit.
In Alaska, KTOO broke the story of a massive food stamp backlog affecting thousands of people,
with the Alaska Press Club later writing that it was the reporter's community-based reporting
ko: 진저 베이커가 래트의 드러머와 드럼 배틀하는 걸 봤겠어.

en: and relationships with sources that brought light to a state problem that affected thousands of Alaskans
ko: PBS의 록 스쿨에서요. 공중파에서는 못 봐요.

en: whose voices needed to be heard. And a reporter at this radio station in New Hampshire
ko: 세서미 스트리트도 빼놓을 수 없고. 미스터 로저스잖아요. 양질의

en: produced both a massive investigation and this podcast about alleged sexual misconduct
at the largest addiction treatment center in the state. And she kept at that reporting,
ko: 프로그래밍이었고 항상 그랬어요. 그걸 변기에 버리다니 너무 아쉬워요.

en: even as the target of her investigation sued her and her station, and as her house,
ko: 할 말이 많지만 주로 윗부분은 문제가 아니야.

en: and those of her parents and her boss were vandalized. And that's something that she later explained
to her public TV station.
My husband checks our security cameras, and sure enough, um, a brick had been thrown
ko: 헤비메탈 밴드 GWAR의 버서커 블로사 리드보컬이 공영 미디어의 그런 팬이었다니 몰랐다고 생각하겠지만.

en: through my living room window, and, uh, the words, just the beginning, were spray-painted, exclamation point.
ko: 분명히 그렇고 그가 "미스터 로저스"라고 말하는 건 아름답고 혼란스러워.

en: Under the broken window. Um... And you have a young daughter.
I do have a young daughter, and... Was there a point when you thought, maybe I won't be continuing this?
Did it make you think about dropping this? Not wanting to continue working on it?
ko: GWAR가 미스터 로저스에 나왔으면 좋겠어. 블로사 넌 있는 그대로 특별해.

en: You know, um, I never considered stopping.
Yeah, that is incredibly brave. Especially because I'm assuming that that message didn't continue just the beginning
of a storied career in investigative journalism.
ko: 하지만 그가 맞아. 이 예산 삭감은 파괴적이야.

en: Keep up the good work. P.S. The brick is made of chocolate.
ko: 이 삭감은 전국적으로 느껴지겠지만 특히 시골, 외진 곳, 원주민 커뮤니티에서.
